name: XB Systems AG
summary: XB Systems AG engages in online betting and gaming business. It targets eSport enthusiasts under the BUFF.bet brand. The company offers sports betting, online casino games, and wagering. It also owns BUFFHUB.com, an eSports media portal that provides news flow, statistics, and proprietary ratings on the eSports gaming industry, which generates targeted traffic for its esports brands, as well as develops software. The company was founded in 2017 and is headquartered in Frankfurt Am Main, Germany.
